question.label: Landing context
question.name: Before we get specific, what feels most useful to talk through today?
question.description: Lets Elena set the agenda without assuming there is a problem to solve.

answer: I do not think anything is broken, but I do feel less grounded than I did before.

assessment.note: She names a diminished sense of grounding compared with before, which is a mild negative clarity signal and also hints at wellbeing strain worth exploring next.

new_queue.label: Less grounded
new_queue.name: When you say 'less grounded,' what has changed underneath that?

new_queue.label: Scope strain
new_queue.name: What part of your current scope feels heaviest right now?

new_queue.label: Manager support
new_queue.name: What would you want more of from me right now?

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I have been quieter in leadership meetings because I am still figuring out where my voice has most leverage.
Part of me is tired from constant context switching, and I have not really said that out loud.
I do not think anything is broken, but I do feel less grounded than I did before.
